# useConstantColor

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether or not to use the constant color.

## Declaration

```swift
var useConstantColor: GLboolean { get set }
```

## Discussion

If the value is set to `GL_TRUE`, then the value stored in the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKBaseEffect/constantColor] property is used as the color value for each vertex. If the value is set to `GL_FALSE`, then your application is expected to enable the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKVertexAttrib/color] attribute and provide per-vertex color data. The default value is `GL_FALSE`.

## Configuring Color Information

- **colorMaterialEnabled**: A Boolean value that indicates whether or not to use the color vertex attribute when calculating the light’s interaction with the material.
- **constantColor**: A constant color, used when per-vertex color data is not provided.
